name: Summer Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds crookneck and/or zucchini, sliced 3/8 inch thick
1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of chicken soup
2 cups herb-seasoned stuffing mix (1/2 of 8-oz package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook summer squash with onion in boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 5 to 10 minutes.
2. Drain well.
3. Combine soup and sour cream; stir in carrot.
4. Fold in drained squash and onion.
5. Melt butter; toss with stuffing mix.
6. Spread half the stuffing mixture in a 12 x 7 x 2-inch baking dish.
7. Spoon vegetable mixture atop.
8. Sprinkle with remaining stuffing mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F until heated through, about 25 to 30 minutes.
